name: crossword
description: A beautiful, local-first crossword puzzle game — clever clues, daily puzzles, kids mode, and a learning puzzle engine.
author: DD-Builder

scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run build:only && npm run test:e2e
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-templates.mjs && node scripts/validate-wordbank.mjs && node scripts/validate-puzzles.mjs && node scripts/check-boundaries.mjs
scripts.ios:init: npm install @capacitor/core @capacitor/cli @capacitor/ios && npx cap add ios
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
